scripts.db:reset:local: wrangler d1 execute cfp-voting --local --command "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS audit_logs; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS votes; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS slot_types; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS talks; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS voters; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS admin_users; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS conferences;" && wrangler d1 execute cfp-voting --local --file ../../packages/db/schema.sql
scripts.db:reset-seed:local: npm run db:reset:local && npm run db:seed:local
